SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF MAR. 19, 2019. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT ARE PRESENT IN OPEN COURT, PARTIES WERE PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-05-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Daniel Yeuk Shun Wong (Appellant/Defendant) with witness Elaine Mak
Tad Nguyen (Respondent/Plaintiff)

This case comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are affirmed.

The Court notes the appeal is untimely. The Court will sign an order dismissing the appeal. Judge Pro Tem: Robert Stumpf, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported
